name: shell-game-vlm
description: Test if vision models can actually track objects. Reveal spatial reasoning gaps in your VLM. Benchmark object persistence and occlusion handling. Diagnose failure modes in visual reasoning. Build adversarial shell-game challenges automatically. Evaluate whether VLMs truly understand 3D geometry. Unlock deep object-tracking capabilities in multimodal models.
paperTitle: Shell Game Vision: Evaluating and Improving Object Tracking in Vision-Language Models
